'''ât-b-j''' ('''katabaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ump|ump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ump|ump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| katabaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitabaj|thitabaj]] || [[word:jitabaj|jitabaj]] || [[word:shitabaj|shitabaj]] || [[word:kitabaj|kitabaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutabaj|thuthutabaj]] || [[word:jujutabaj|jujutabaj]] || [[word:shushutabaj|shushutabaj]] || [[word:kukutabaj|kukutabaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutabaj|thutabaj]] || [[word:jutabaj|jutabaj]] || [[word:shutabaj|shutabaj]] || [[word:kutabaj|kutabaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutabaj|thutabaj]] || [[word:jutabaj|jutabaj]] || [[word:shutabaj|shutabaj]] || [[word:kutabaj|kutabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetabaj|thetabaj]] || [[word:jetabaj|jetabaj]] || [[word:shetabaj|shetabaj]] || [[word:ketabaj|ketabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotabaj|thothotabaj]] || [[word:jojotabaj|jojotabaj]] || [[word:shoshotabaj|shoshotabaj]] || [[word:kokotabaj|kokotabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotabaj|thotabaj]] || [[word:jotabaj|jotabaj]] || [[word:shotabaj|shotabaj]] || [[word:kotabaj|kotabaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotabaj|thotabaj]] || [[word:jotabaj|jotabaj]] || [[word:shotabaj|shotabaj]] || [[word:kotabaj|kotabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtabaj|thĂŠtabaj]] || [[word:jĂŠtabaj|jĂŠtabaj]] || [[word:shĂŠtabaj|shĂŠtabaj]] || [[word:kĂŠtabaj|kĂŠtabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatabaj|thathatabaj]] || [[word:jajatabaj|jajatabaj]] || [[word:shashatabaj|shashatabaj]] || [[word:kakatabaj|kakatabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatabaj|thatabaj]] || [[word:jatabaj|jatabaj]] || [[word:shatabaj|shatabaj]] || [[word:katabaj|katabaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatabaj|thatabaj]] || [[word:jatabaj|jatabaj]] || [[word:shatabaj|shatabaj]] || [[word:katabaj|katabaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatabaj|shatabaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatabaj|goshatabaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatabaj|gokishatabaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatabajnĂŒ|shatabajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatabajnknĂŒ|goshatabajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatabajnĂŒ|gokishatabajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatabajshĂ«|shatabajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatabajnkshĂ«|goshatabajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatabajshĂ«|gokishatabajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatabajro|shatabajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatabajnkro|goshatabajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatabajro|gokishatabajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatabajmu|shatabajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatabajnkmu|goshatabajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatabajmu|gokishatabajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatabajsher|shatabajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatabajnksher|goshatabajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatabajsher|gokishatabajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatabajng|shatabajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatabajnkng|goshatabajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatabajng|gokishatabajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatabajya|shatabajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatabajnkya|goshatabajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatabajya|gokishatabajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatabajyam|shatabajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatabajnkyam|goshatabajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatabajyam|gokishatabajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatabajnĂŒshĂ«|shatabajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatabajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatabajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatabajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatabajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatabajnĂŒro|shatabajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatabajnknĂŒro|goshatabajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatabajnĂŒro|gokishatabajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatabajnĂŒmu|shatabajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatabajnknĂŒmu|goshatabajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatabajnĂŒmu|gokishatabajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatabajshĂ«nĂŒ|shatabajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatabajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatabajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatabajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatabajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatabajshĂ«ro|shatabajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatabajnkshĂ«ro|goshatabajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatabajshĂ«ro|gokishatabajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatabajshĂ«mu|shatabajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatabajnkshĂ«mu|goshatabajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatabajshĂ«mu|gokishatabajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatabajronĂŒ|shatabajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatabajnkronĂŒ|goshatabajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatabajronĂŒ|gokishatabajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatabajroshĂ«|shatabajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatabajnkroshĂ«|goshatabajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatabajroshĂ«|gokishatabajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatabajromu|shatabajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatabajnkromu|goshatabajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatabajromu|gokishatabajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatabajmunĂŒ|shatabajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatabajnkmunĂŒ|goshatabajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatabajmunĂŒ|gokishatabajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatabajmushĂ«|shatabajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatabajnkmushĂ«|goshatabajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatabajmushĂ«|gokishatabajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatabajmuro|shatabajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatabajnkmuro|goshatabajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatabajmuro|gokishatabajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
